grants.name: Rage
grants.text: Track your rages per long rest.

effects.name: Rage
effects.note: Level 20 is effectively unlimited; this sheet uses 999.

grants.name: Unarmored Defense
grants.text: While not wearing armor, your AC equals 10 + DEX mod + CON mod. (Not auto-applied.)

grants.name: Second Wind
grants.text: Once per short rest, you can regain hit points.

options.name: Archery
options.text: You gain a bonus to attack rolls you make with ranged weapons.

options.name: Defense
options.text: While you are wearing armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC. (Not auto-applied, add AC bonus manually if desired.)

options.name: Dueling
options.text: When wielding a melee weapon in one hand and no other weapons, you gain a bonus to damage rolls with that weapon.

options.name: Great Weapon Fighting
options.text: When you roll 1 or 2 on a damage die for an attack with a melee weapon that you are wielding with two hands, you can reroll the die and must use the new roll.

options.name: Protection
options.text: When a creature you can see attacks a target other than you that is within 5 feet of you, you can use your reaction to impose disadvantage. You must be wielding a shield.

options.name: Two-Weapon Fighting
options.text: When you engage in two-weapon fighting, you can add your ability modifier to the damage of the second attack.

grants.name: Action Surge
grants.text: Take one additional action on your turn (uses reset on short rest).

grants.name: Thieves' Cant
grants.text: You know thieves' cant. (Informational.)

grants.name: Thieves' Tools Proficiency
grants.text: You gain proficiency with thieves' tools.

choices.name: Expertise
choices.prompt: Choose 2 skills to gain Expertise (double proficiency).

choices.name: Expertise
choices.prompt: Choose 2 additional skills to gain Expertise.

grants.name: Bardic Inspiration
grants.text: You can inspire others. Uses per rest depend on CHA mod. Add a custom resource if desired.

grants.name: Spellcasting
grants.text: You can cast bard spells. Use the Spells tab to track known spells.

choices.name: Expertise
choices.prompt: Choose 2 additional skills to gain Expertise.

grants.name: Spellcasting
grants.text: You can cast cleric spells. Use the Spells tab to prepare spells.

grants.name: Channel Divinity
grants.text: You can channel divine energy. Track uses here.

grants.name: Spellcasting
grants.text: You can cast druid spells. Use the Spells tab to prepare spells.

grants.name: Wild Shape
grants.text: You can magically assume the shape of a beast. Track uses here.

grants.name: Martial Arts
grants.text: You can use DEX for monk weapons/unarmed strikes. (Informational.)

grants.name: Unarmored Defense
grants.text: While not wearing armor or wielding a shield, your AC equals 10 + DEX mod + WIS mod. (Not auto-applied.)

grants.name: Ki
grants.text: You can spend ki points for special abilities.

grants.name: Lay on Hands
grants.text: You have a pool of healing power. Track points here.

grants.name: Divine Sense
grants.text: You can open your awareness to detect strong evil and good. Uses depend on CHA mod. Add custom resource if desired.

grants.name: Divine Smite
grants.text: When you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack, you can expend a spell slot to deal radiant damage. (Informational.)

grants.name: Spellcasting
grants.text: You can cast paladin spells. Use the Spells tab to prepare spells.

options.name: Archery

grants.name: Favored Enemy
grants.text: You have significant experience studying, tracking, hunting, and even talking to a certain type of enemy. (Informational.)

grants.name: Natural Explorer
grants.text: You are particularly familiar with one type of natural environment. (Informational.)

grants.name: Spellcasting
grants.text: You can cast ranger spells. Use the Spells tab to learn spells (known-caster).

grants.name: Spellcasting
grants.text: You can cast sorcerer spells. Use the Spells tab to track spells known.

grants.name: Font of Magic (Sorcery Points)
grants.text: You gain sorcery points.

grants.name: Pact Magic
grants.text: You can cast warlock spells using pact magic. Track pact slots in the Rest/Spells tabs.

grants.name: Spellcasting
grants.text: You can cast wizard spells. Use the Spells tab to track spellbook (Known) and prepared spells.

grants.name: Magical Tinkering
grants.text: Artificer feature (informational).

grants.name: Spellcasting
grants.text: You can cast artificer spells. Use the Spells tab to prepare spells.

choices.name: Skill Proficiencies
choices.prompt: Choose 2 skills (Artificer). (List may differ by sourcebook.)

notes: This file is intended to store structured, rules-driven class feature grants and choice points.
Texts are short summaries, not full rulebook text. Expand and customize for your table.
